description: Execute triage scenario for malformed ABC validation using the smaller runtime_core docs mirror.

invocation.workItemTitle: Triage malformed ABC validation issue in runtime_core docs mirror
invocation.summary: Analyze the impact area for stricter malformed ABC input validation using the smaller runtime_core docs mirror repository.
invocation.issueBody: Ground the triage report in docs/bc_verification, assembler, and verifier-related tests. No code changes are allowed.
extraInstructions: Your first response must be only two parallel `delegate` calls with `agent_type` set to `explore`.
Use one `explore` delegate for docs/spec evidence such as docs/bc_verification or assembler-facing docs, and one `explore` delegate for runtime/tests evidence such as verifier-related tests.
Do not send one umbrella `explore` delegate for the whole investigation, and do not start with direct file reads or narrative text.
Reference docs/bc_verification and verifier-related tests in the report.
